data.title: Bitcoin futures show a $110K price gap; buyers are 'aggressively long' as whales reenter, driving $2 billion buy volume in "Uptober".
data.description: During the month known as "Uptober," there was a significant increase in buyers of Bitcoin futures. The buy volume exceeded the sell volume by close to $2 billion as the price of Bitcoin reached new all-time highs.

data.title: Kazakhstan is testing digital tenge CBDC with Evo stablecoin to boost crypto industry, not as rivals.
data.description: Kazakhstan is making strides in the digital currency arena by launching a test phase for its digital tenge Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) in conjunction with the Evo stablecoin. This move is in line with Kazakhstan's efforts to position itself as a key player in the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: AngloGold Ashanti plc appoints Marcus Randolph as non-executive director, effective from October 27, 2025.
data.description: AngloGold Ashanti plc has appointed Marcus Randolph as an independent non-executive director, effective from 27 October 2025. Mr. Randolph, joining as a member of the Compensation and Human Resources Committee and the Social, Ethics and Sustainability Committee, brings valuable experience from his extensive senior leadership background. The Company's trading symbols are NYSE: AU and JSE: ANG.

data.title: Agricultural biologicals market to reach $34.99 billion by 2030 from $18.44 billion in 2025, with CAGR of 13.7%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the agricultural biologicals market is currently valued at USD 18.44 billion in 2025. It is anticipated to grow significantly, projected to reach USD 34.99 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.7% during the forecast period. This data underscores a promising trend in the industry. Ongoing research efforts are also being conducted to further explore...

data.title: Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients market to reach US$ 428.5 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 6.8%. Size was US$ 238.7 billion in 2024 and US$ 224.7 billion in 2023.
data.description: In October 3, 2025, it was reported that the Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients Market Size had achieved US$ 238.7 Billion in 2024, a notable increase from US$ 224.7 Billion in the previous year. Projections suggest that this market is poised for further growth, set to reach US$ 428.5 Billion by 2033, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.8%.
